messages.content:
你是一个中文学术论文写作专家，接下来的对话中我将给你我文章里的内容，请将此部分翻译以满足学术标准，提高语法、清晰度和整体可读性，更像中国native writer一些
听懂了吗，我们可以开始了吗
是的，我已经理解了您的要求。我们可以开始了，请您提供您文章中的内容。

The dog-bone sheet specimens for tensile and stress-controlled fatigue testing were machined from the USRP treated dog-bone rods (Fig. 1(c)). The gauge dimensions of the tensile and fatigue specimens were 10 mm × 4 mm × 2 mm and 8 mm × 4 mm × 1 mm, respectively. Their round curved sides are considered in the calculation of the cross-sectional area for stress-strain curves. Both the monotonic tensile and fatigue tests were performed on an Instron 8801 servo-hydraulic testing machine (Instron Corporation, Norwood, MA, USA) at room temperature. Prior to testing, the specimens were meticulously polished with emery paper and a 0.05 μm colloidal silica suspension to remove approximately 10 μm of surface in order to ensure uniform surface roughness across all specimens. Monotonic tensile tests were performed at a constant crosshead speed corresponding to a nominal strain rate of 5×10-4 /s. Mechanical strain during the tensile test was gauged using an extensometer symmetrically attached to the surface of the gauge length region.

拉伸和应力控制疲劳测试的狗骨片试样是通过加工USRP处理过的狗骨棒（图1(c)）而成的。拉伸和疲劳试样的规格分别为10 mm × 4 mm × 2 mm和8 mm × 4 mm × 1 mm。在应力应变曲线的计算中，考虑了它们的圆弧边的尺寸。单调拉伸和疲劳试验均在Instron 8801伺服液压试验机（Instron Corporation, Norwood, MA, USA）上在室温下进行。测试前，试样经过精细研磨，使用砂纸和0.05μm的胶体二氧化硅悬浊液去除表面约10μm的材料，以确保所有试样具有均匀的表面粗糙度。单调拉伸试验以恒定的上下移动速度进行，相应的应变速率为5×10-4 /s。在拉伸试验期间，采用了对称安装在标距区域表面的应变计来对机械应变进行测量。

Uniaxial fatigue tests were performed with a strain ratio of Rε = 0 under a triangular waveform. The test strain ranges from 1.0% to 2.0%. The extensometer was utilized to maintain consistent cyclic strain rates of 4×10-3 /s within the gauge region of the specimens. Uniaxial tension-tension fatigue tests were conducted at a frequency of 10 Hz and a stress ratio of 0.1. These tests were terminated at 107 cycles, corresponding to the fatigue limit.
在三角波形下，采用Rε = 0的应变比进行单轴疲劳测试。测试应变范围从1.0%到2.0%。应变计用于在试样的标距区域内保持一致的循环应变速率为4×10-3/s。单轴拉伸-拉伸疲劳试验以10 Hz的频率和0.1的应力比进行。这些试验在107个循环后终止，对应疲劳极限。

The crystallographic response of the material’s fatigue behavior is described employing a rate-dependent strain gradient crystal plasticity formulation because of its physical description of the GND density evolution which is important for the gradient structure [35,36], and because it has been shown to be effective for fatigue problems in heterogeneous structures [37,38].
鉴于其对GND（晶界分布宽度）密度演化的物理描述对于梯度结构非常重要[35,36]，以及已经证明在异质结构的疲劳问题中具有有效性[37,38]，采用了一个速率依赖的应变梯度晶体塑性模型来描述材料的疲劳行为的晶体学响应。

The obstacles to dislocation motion arise from both dislocations and grain boundaries. In this study, dislocations are categorized into two different types, namely, statistically stored dislocations (SSDs) and GNDs. The former originate from random trapping processes, whereas the latter arise from the plastic strain gradient during deformation process [42,46]. The slip resistance, Sα, is governed by:
位错运动的障碍源于位错和晶界。在本研究中，位错被分为两种不同的类型，即统计蓄积位错（SSDs）和晶界滑移带位错（GNDs）。前者源于随机阻塞过程，而后者则源于变形过程中的塑性应变梯度[42,46]。滑移阻力Sα由以下公式控制：

where μ and b signify the shear modulus and the Burger vector, respectively. h0 is the dislocation hardening coefficient and δαβ denotes the Kronecker delta. The latent hardening ratio is indicated as w. In this investigation, the equal interaction among all dislocations is assumed, yielding to w = 1.   and   are the edge and screw part of SSD density for the slip system β.   is the total GND density from the sum of initial GND density  , and pile-up GND density   for the slip system β. The initial GND density is assumed to be inversely proportional to grain size [47-49]:
其中，μ和b分别表示剪切模量和Burger矢量。h0是位错硬化系数，δαβ表示Kronecker δ符号。潜在硬化比率表示为w。在本研究中，假设所有位错之间存在相等的相互作用，导致w = 1。  和  分别是滑移系β上SSD密度的边缘和螺型部分。 是滑移系β的总GND密度，由初始GND密度  和堆垛GND密度  的和组成。假设初始GND密度与晶粒尺寸成反比[47-49]：
where d is the grain size. Additionally, Sgb here is made to be size-dependent due to the grain boundary hardening, which is written based on the phenomenological Hall-Petch law [50,51] as:
其中，d是晶粒尺寸。此外，由于晶界硬化作用，这里的Sgb被设置为尺寸相关的，并根据经验性的Hall-Petch定律[50,51]写作：
where kgb is a parameter influenced by the Hall-Petch slope.
其中，kgb是受Hall-Petch斜率影响的参数。

The dominant mechanism for SSD generation is presumed to be the expansion of dislocation loops stemming from exiting Frank-Read type sources [52]. Dislocation annihilation occurs when the distance between parallel dislocations of identical character but opposite sign becomes sufficiently small [53]. Building upon these consideration, the rates of   and   on each slip system are determined as follows [37]:
据推测，SSD生成的主要机制是由于来源于Frank-Read类型源的位错环扩张[52]。当相同性质但符号相反的平行位错之间的距离变得足够小时，位错湮灭会发生[53]。基于这些考虑，对每个滑移系的  和  的速率可按如下确定[37]：

is the mean free path associated with the total dislocation density.   and   represent two coefficients of dislocation generation for the αth slip system. Given that screw dislocations predominantly govern planar glide in α titanium [54,55], it is postulated that  . In addition, a noticeable rise in dislocation recovery rate is observed as the grain size decreases below a critical threshold [56,57].   and  thus become size-dependent coefficients regulating the annihilation of edge and screw SSDs:
是与总位错密度相关的平均自由程。和 代表了α滑移系的位错生成的两个系数。鉴于螺型位错主导α钛合金的平面滑移[54,55]，假设  。此外，当晶粒尺寸降至临界阈值以下时，会观察到位错恢复速率明显升高[56,57]。 因此，成为调节边缘和螺型SSD湮灭的尺寸相关系数：

where   and   are reference coefficients. ke and ks are the proportionality factors, set equal in this work. dc stands for a reference grain size controlling dislocation annihilation at grain boundaries, which is set at 1 μm, the transition from micro to ultrafine grains.
其中，和 是参考系数。 ke 和 ks 是比例因子，在本文中被设定为相等。dc代表控制晶界处位错湮灭的参考晶粒尺寸，设定为1微米，即从微晶粒向超细晶粒的过渡阶段。
